children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as provided in this section, the selection for promotion of officers in any competitive category of officers designated for purposes of this subchapter shall be governed by the provisions of subchapter I of this chapter.

children.heading: .—No Recommendation for Promotion of Officers Below Promotion Zone
children.label: b .—No Recommendation for Promotion of Officers Below Promotion Zone
children.text: shall not apply to the selection for promotion of officers described in subsection (a).Section 616(b) of this title

children.heading: .—Recommendation for Officers To Be Excluded From Future Consideration for Promotion
children.label: c .—Recommendation for Officers To Be Excluded From Future Consideration for Promotion
children.text: In making recommendations pursuant to for purposes of the administration of this subchapter, a selection board convened under may recommend that an officer considered by the board be excluded from future consideration for promotion under this chapter.section 616 of this titlesection 611(a) of this title
